page_metadata.biotools__summary: SurvivalGWAS_Power performs power calculations for time to event outcomes over a range of study designs and different analytical approaches. The software calculates the power to detect single nucleotide polymorphism association with a time to event outcome over a range of study design scenarios.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SurvivalGWAS_Power performs power calculations for time to event outcomes over a range of study designs and different analytical approaches. The software calculates the power to detect single nucleotide polymorphism association with a time to event outcome over a range of study design scenarios.
